metadata.description: The subject is a male-presenting individual in their 40s, with olive skin showing some fine lines around the eyes. Their face is oval-shaped with a defined jawline. Dark brown, tightly curled hair, shoulder-length, frames the face, with a receding hairline visible at the temples. The eyes are almond-shaped and set, with a warm hazel color. Thick, dark eyebrows have a natural, slightly arched shape. The nose is straight with a defined bridge and a rounded tip. The lips are medium-thick with a neutral shape. A full beard and mustache, salt-and-pepper gray, covers the lower face. The subject has a direct gaze, with the head held straight, facing forward.
metadata.anchor: male with curly dark brown hair and salt-and-pepper beard
